chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-8521 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. No.37461/2018 (Stay) 3. For hearing of main case 14.1.2026 None present for the petitioner --------------------- This petition is pending since 06.12.2018; however, there is no progress in the matter since long. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed / pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
